title: Bacteria
content:
There once were some learned M.D.'s,
     Who captured some germs of disease,
        And infected a train
        Which, without causing pain,
     Allowed one to catch it with ease.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Bacteria", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
